creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)
That's their choice to make.
I don't believe FreeBSD should follow Linux blindly in every decision... that's probably one of the reasons why FreeBSD has fewer users than Linux in my opinion.

Their security concern is that it's unmaintained upstream.

But there are no current known security issues.
Should one arise, as maintainer I will look into it - that's why I took over maintainer of the port.
